name: rota
description: Rota — global group savings & rotating credit circles on Arc

scripts.deploy:local: cd contracts && forge script script/DeployLocal.s.sol --rpc-url http://127.0.0.1:8545 --broadcast --private-key 0xac0974bec39a17e36ba4a6b4d238ff944bacb478cbed5efcae784d7bf4f2ff80 && cd .. && node scripts/abi-sync.mjs
scripts.deploy:arc: set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; [ -f .env.local ] && . ./.env.local; set +a; cd contracts && forge script script/DeployArc.s.sol --rpc-url https://rpc.testnet.arc.network --broadcast && cd .. && node scripts/abi-sync.mjs
